articles.author: Sam McNeil, Abdul Qahar Afghan
articles.title: Afghan Taliban hold first, closed-door talks with EU on deportations - AP News
articles.description: A Taliban delegation has met in Brussels with European Union staff for closed-door talks focusing on deportations, according to a Taliban official. Afghans are among the largest groups seeking asylum in the EU, but many governments want to speed up deportatio…
articles.content: BRUSSELS (AP) A delegation from the Afghan Taliban met Tuesday with European Union staff in Brussels for closed-door talks that focused on diplomatic services and the dignified returns of Afghans to … [+6080 chars]
